description: Go module with golang.org/x/text v0.3.7 paired with an upstream OpenVEX document that declares CVE-2022-32149 as not_affected with justification vulnerable_code_not_present. Also includes a real Red Hat CSAF VEX advisory (RHSA-2020:1358) for format testing.

findings.human_justification: Upstream OpenVEX document explicitly declares this CVE as not_affected with justification vulnerable_code_not_present for this exact product PURL.
